description: Flagsmith is a feature flag and remote configuration platform for managing releases, experiments, and user targeting across applications. It is available as a hosted service, private cloud, or self-hosted open source deployment.
summary: Flagsmith exposes two HTTP APIs (Admin API and Flags API), a remote MCP server, and an npm CLI; the APIs and CLI use either an organisation API key or environment key depending on surface, and the MCP server supports either interactive OAuth or an organisation API key.
